rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as follows: Allege facts sufficient to demonstrate compliance with administrative exhaustion. Allege facts sufficient to demonstrate compliance with Govt. Code 911.2 If Plaintiff wishes to bring all causes of action against all defendants, Plaintiff must allege sufficient facts to sustain each cause of action against each defendant, including SFHA. Alternatively, if Defendant would like to request a continuance of a hearing to allow sufficient time to file an addition Reply, they may do so. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion To Strike GRANTED. Paragraphs 666, 71, 107, 110 and Prayer for Relief Nos. 3 and 7 are stricken in so far as they allege punitive damages against SFHA, a government entity. (See Gov. Code §818.) = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JASON TRAVIS's Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Sanctions transferred to Department 302 to be heard on June 17, 2019 at 9:00am.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE TOY VS. HAO KING INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF ALICE TOY's Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery The Court determines that Defendants' subpoenas, as currently written, are unreasonably overbroad. The Parties are ordered to report at 8:30am on June 3,2019 in Dept. 501 to engage in meet and confer discussions in good faith and resolve outstanding issues. = (501/CFH)
